name: sai-physiotherapy
description: SAI Physiotherapy Spine Care & Paralysis Centre — Enterprise Clinic Management Platform

scripts.postinstall: npm run build --workspace=@sai-physio/types --if-present && npm run build --workspace=@sai-physio/utils --if-present
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run start --workspace=backend" "npm run start --workspace=frontend"
